utterances: Hey, are you still coming to dinner tonight?
I don't think I can make it anymore.
What? You told me yesterday that you were definitely coming.
I know, I'm sorry. Something came up at work.
You always say that at the last minute.
That's not fair. I don't always cancel.
Maybe not always, but this is the third time this month.
I didn't realize it happened that often.
Well, it did, and honestly I'm getting tired of planning things around you.
I really didn't mean to make you feel that way.
I invited everyone because I thought we'd finally spend some time together.
Now I feel terrible.
I was angry when you cancelled, but I appreciate you saying that.
Can I make it up to you tomorrow?
Maybe. What did you have in mind?
Lunch, my treat, and I promise I won't cancel.
That actually sounds nice.
So... are we okay?
Yeah, we're okay. I'm still a little annoyed, though.
Fair enough. I'll try to do better.
